title: conyza oligantha
intro: Conyza oligantha, also known as the annual fleabane, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the daisy family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Conyza oligantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and even help to alleviate respiratory issues. Conyza oligantha can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, making it accessible for use in traditional and modern herbal remedies.
